reviews.comment:
Desastroso. 25 minutos esperando atendieron a 6 autos que llegaron después de mi. Y no eran socios de aca. Los playeros me miraban y seguían atendiendo a otros clientes. No lo recomiendo

(Translated by Google)
Disastrous. I waited 25 minutes and they served six cars that arrived after me. And they weren't even members of this club. The attendants just looked at me and continued serving other customers. I don't recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11189743280620158761/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5czZPNkd3EAE

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención!! Estuvimos esperando nos atiendan había cola en espera un solo Playero atendiendo el otro charlando con un amigo !!!

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service!! We waited for someone to serve us, there was a line waiting, only one player serving, the other chatting with a friend!!!

reviews.comment:
Buen servicio. Atienden rápido y el aire para inflar los neumáticos siempre funciona y no hay que pagar por usarlo... es realmente un servicio para los que cargan combustible!!!

(Translated by Google)
Great service. They're quick, the air pump for inflating tires always works, and you don't have to pay to use it... it's truly a great service for those who fill up their tanks!
